generated_oml:
// Physical components
instance PhysicalCraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Mechanical frame of lab‑scale gantry crane"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cart stepper motor controlled by TMC4671 controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hoist stepper motor controlled by TMC4671 controller"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Electromagnet on hoist for picking up containers"
]

// Sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing‑angle encoder mounted on the hoist"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleTopic
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer for wind speed measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedTopic
]

instance CartStepperMotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder integrated in Cart stepper motor TMC4671"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartMotorTopic
]

instance HoistStepperMotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder integrated in Hoist stepper motor TMC4671"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistMotorTopic
]

// Data transmitted via MQTT
instance SwingAngleTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
    base:desc "MQTT topic publishing swing‑angle sensor readings at 50 Hz"
]

instance WindSpeedTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
    base:desc "MQTT topic publishing wind speed measurements"
]

instance CartMotorTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartStepperMotorEncoder
    base:desc "MQTT topic publishing cart stepper motor encoder counts"
]

instance HoistMotorTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistStepperMotorEncoder
    base:desc "MQTT topic publishing hoist stepper motor encoder counts"
]

// Time‑series data stored in TimescaleDB
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous record of swing angle in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous record of wind speed in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance CartMotorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous record of cart motor encoder counts in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartMotorTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance HoistMotorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous record of hoist motor encoder counts in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistMotorTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

// Models
instance CADGeometryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD geometry of gantry crane produced in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D kinematic model used by Trajectory Generator and Simulation Service"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

// Insights
instance SwingDeviationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert generated when swing deviation exceeds threshold in continuous validation"
]

instance DistanceMetricInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight reporting distance metric between measured and simulated trajectories"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert indicating an optimal swing‑free trajectory has been generated"
]

instance PerformanceTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Trend insights on performance over time derived from simulation traces"
]

instance StateLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that state data has been logged to TimescaleDB"
]

instance DashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that dashboard visualization is available"
]

// Actions
instance AdjustTrajectoryLimits : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of trajectory limits based on deviation patterns"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TechnicalIntervention : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggered maintenance or intervention when fault detection indicates anomaly"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// Enablers (Docker containers / services)
instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB instance enabling Logging service functionality"
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService
]

instance LoggingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker container providing Logging service functionality"
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker container providing Visualization service (Grafana) functionality"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance TrajectoryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker container providing Trajectory Generation service"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker container providing Simulation service"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker container providing Continuous Validation service"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

// Services
instance LoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous state capture service writing sensor data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateLoggingInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Physics‑based kinematic model producing optimal swing‑free movement plans"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryAlert, AdjustTrajectoryLimits
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Forward simulation of crane and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceTrendInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time comparison of measured vs simulated trajectories and distance metric calculation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SwingDeviationAlert, DistanceMetricInsight, TechnicalIntervention
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboards for real‑time monitoring and simulated trajectory overlays"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardInsight
]

// Environment
instance LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalCraneFrame, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet,
    SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartStepperMotorEncoder, HoistStepperMotorEncoder,
    SwingAngleTopic, WindSpeedTopic, CartMotorTopic, HoistMotorTopic,
    SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData, CartMotorData, HoistMotorData,
    CADGeometryModel, KinematicModel,
    TimescaleDBEnabler, LoggingEnabler, VisualizationEnabler,
    TrajectoryEnabler, SimulationEnabler, ContinuousValidationEnabler,
    LoggingService, TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService,
    ContinuousValidationService, VisualizationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application publishes command topics to MQTT (e.g., target position, trajectory profiles). The Physical Crane Interface receives these topics, translates them into motor controller commands (stepper driver configuration, electromagnet activation) and sends them over USB/serial to the TMC4671 controllers. The Trajectory Generator Service emits optimal motion plans, the Continuous Validation Service issues alerts via MQTT when thresholds are breached, which are displayed on the HMI."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "All services operate in real‑time: the Logging Service samples every control loop cycle (~10–20 ms), the Trajectory Generator updates on command, the Continuous Validation runs continuously with each telemetry point, effectively providing continuous monitoring and immediate feedback."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system ingests physical sensor data via the Physical Crane Interface into the Logging Application, stores it in the Database, and makes it available to MQTT topics. The Trajectory Generator Service publishes motion plans; the Simulation Service generates simulated trajectories for comparison. The Continuous Validation Service consumes both measured and simulated data, computes distance metrics against a threshold, and publishes alerts to the HMI. All services communicate through the Eclipse Mosquitto broker, orchestrated by Docker Compose on a single host."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Designed (CAD and kinematic models in Fusion360); Manufactured (physical crane assembled with TMC4671 drivers, Arduino, sensors); Operated (runtime logging, simulation, validation). The digital twin evolves through continuous validation research, fault detection extensions, and teaching‑based feature extensions (e.g., harbor simulation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The kinematic model is validated against real‑time measurements via the Continuous Validation Service: measured swing angles and positions are compared against simulated ones, a distance metric is calculated, and a threshold determines validity. The database stores raw data for post‑hoc verification; Grafana allows visual inspection of deviations. No formal model verification is described, but continuous validation provides runtime fidelity checks."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between physical and virtual layers uses MQTT over TCP/IP within the Docker network. The Physical Crane Interface talks to motor controllers over USB/serial. The dashboard and services access the database over PostgreSQL protocol. All containers are bound to a private Docker bridge network."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components (Python services, TimescaleDB, Mosquitto broker, Grafana) are containerized and deployed on a single personal computer using Docker Compose. The repository is hosted on GitHub, with installation instructions and documentation in MkDocs. No cloud hosting is used."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Explicitly follows an ad‑hoc approach; does not employ a dedicated digital twin framework or industry standard, relying instead on open‑source tools (Python, Docker, TimescaleDB, Mosquitto, Grafana); no formal standardization is reported."
]
